class.name: QueryTest2D
class.brief_description: Tests each [QueryItem2D] from a [QueryGenerator2D] to determine which is the best option.
class.description: Tests each [QueryItem2D] from a [QueryGenerator2D] to determine which is the best option.

method.name: _perform_test
method.description: Performs the test on this [param projection]. It adds score or filters it out.

members.member: How expensive this test will be to execute.
What conditions must be met for each context member while filtering.
What operation will happen for each context member while scoring.

constants.constant: Takes the average score of each context member.
Takes the max score of each context member.
Takes the min score of each context member.
Any context member must pass the test.
All context members must pass the test.
